pageContext.name: Cloud Strife (Dress Ver.)
pageContext.description: Cloud, wearing one of the dresses from the unforgettable Wall Market section of FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE, joins the STATIC ARTS line!  While retaining Cloud's stoic demeanor, the figure nails Cloud's makeup, hair ornament, and pigtails. Every fine detail has particular attention paid to it, from the texture of the ruffles on the sleeves and collar, to the accessories, ribbons, and skirt folds. The realistic details, such as Cloud's skin texture among others, show a level of quality that only STATIC ARTS can achieve.  Base Included
